title: The Dragon Egg
description: Deep inside an abandoned cave, you discover an enormous egg resting in a nest of scorched bones. Its shell is warm, and something inside is moving.

options.title: Take the Egg
options.description: Carry the mysterious egg with you and discover what lies inside.

options.title: Sell the Egg
options.description: Find a wealthy buyer before whatever is inside decides to hatch.

options.title: Destroy the Egg
options.description: Crack the shell before whatever is inside can threaten the world.
